potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall check if the inserted card is valid.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If everything is fine, the user is asked to select an amount to withdraw.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall prompt the user to select an amount to withdraw only if the card is valid.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall go out of service and not allow any operation if the machine is not working.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement introduces a new condition that was not present in the source text.

final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
